Sulph..Abdomen, rumbling: Fullness, rumbling, motions, gurgling with or without diarrhea.
Sulph..Abdomen, weakness, sensation of: Emptiness relieved by passing flatus and by eructations.
Sulph..Back: Tenderness of the spine. Sore pain in the small of the back and sacrum.
Sulph..Back, pain: Sore pain in the small of the back and sacrum. Pain in the small of the back during the night compelling her to lie on the right side; it passes away in the morning after rising.
Sulph..Back, pain, dorsal region: Piercing pain between the scapulae in the evening while sitting.
Sulph..Bladder: Must rise often in the night to urinate. Burning during and after urination.
Sulph..Bladder, urination, frequent: Must rise often in the night to urinate.
Sulph..Chest: Oppression of the chest from damp evening air and in the morning on waking. Emptiness in the chest on inspiration. Soreness in the chest on coughing, better by holding the chest with the bands.
Sulph..Heart & Circulation, palpitation: spells of rapid beating of heart
Sulph..Chill: Chill from 6 to 9 P.M., with fever, than dry heat until 1 A.M., sweat absent. Chill with icy coldness and gooseflesh from 4 to 8 P.M. during menses. Shaking chills. Chilliness with fever in the evening from night air.
Sulph..Extremities: Trembling, twitching and weakness in the limbs, twitching in hands and feet during sleep. Pains in the limbs during rest. Rheumatic pains in the limbs in wet weather.
Sulph..Extremities, coldness: Chill with icy coldness and gooseflesh from 4 to 8 P.M. during menses.
Sulph..Generalities: Marked weakness and trembling with internal pulsations and rapid heart. Twitching of muscles. Complaints from injuries of head and spine. The symptoms all worse during rest.
Sulph..Generalities, weakness, enervation: Marked weakness and trembling with internal pulsations and rapid heart.
Sulph..Genitalia female: The menstrual flow is copious, acrid and clotted. Leucorrhoea acrid greenish, purulent, excoriating the parts.
Sulph..Genitalia female, pain: Burning in the roof of the mouth during menses.
Sulph..Head: Subject to vertigo, congestive headaches with fullness and heat. Pressing outward in the head with pulsation. Periodical headaches with vomiting bile.
Sulph..Head, congestion, vertex: Splitting pain in the vertex. Heat of the vertex.
Sulph..Mind: Extremely irritable in the morning. Violent anger which is followed by jaundice. Aversion to company. Dislikes to speak or to be spoken to. Dullness of mind and excitability.
Sulph..Mind, restlessness, night: Restlessness of the limbs at night in bed.
Sulph..Mouth: The mouth is always slimy. Much mucus forms in the mouth and throat. Blisters on the tongue and roof of the mouth. Numbness in the mouth. Salivation.
